channel.title: 21th Workshop on Numerical Methods for Problems with Layer Phenomena on Layer Phenomena 2025
channel.description: Recent content in 21th Workshop on Numerical Methods for Problems with Layer Phenomena on Layer Phenomena 2025

item.title: Contact
item.description: If you have any queries about the Workshop, get in touch with Niall at Niall.Madden@UniversityOfGalway.ie

item.title: Registration and Abstracts
item.description: The Workshop is free, but registration is required. To register your interest in participating, please complete this form, or send an email to Niall (Niall.Madden@UniversityOfGalway.ie) with your name and affiliation, and information on if you wish to give a talk. The deadline for registration will be posted here 6 months before the workshop. Tea and coffee will be provided during breaks. Lunch, the conference dinner, travel, accommodation, etc., are at the participants' expense.
